title: IMF to cut global growth forecast due to West Asia conflict
content:
The IMF (International Monetary Fund) plans to lower its global economic growth forecast.
*   This downward revision is a direct consequence of the ongoing conflict in West Asia.
*   The announcement indicates a more pessimistic outlook for the world economy.

title: World Bank slashes India’s 2026-27 growth outlook to 6.6% on West Asia conflict impact
content:
The World Bank has reduced India's economic growth forecast.
*   The growth outlook for India in fiscal year 2026-27 has been cut to 6.6%.
*   This downward revision is primarily due to the impact of the conflict in West Asia.

title: IMF strikes staff-level deal with Sri Lanka on $700 million in funding
content:
The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has reached a staff-level agreement with Sri Lanka.
*   This deal is related to a new funding package for the country.
*   The funding agreed upon is valued at $700 million.

title: Satellite data reveal Earth is getting brighter at night: Major regions include sub-Saharan Africa and Southeast Asia
content:
Satellite data indicates a global increase in Earth's nighttime brightness.
*   This phenomenon suggests a trend of more artificial light being emitted after dark.
*   Sub-Saharan Africa and Southeast Asia are highlighted as major regions experiencing this brightening.

title: Gaganyaan mission: ISRO completes second Integrated Air Drop Test
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   ISRO has successfully completed an Integrated Air Drop Test.
*   This marks the second such test conducted as part of the Gaganyaan human spaceflight mission.
*   The completion of this test represents a further step in the mission's development.

title: Implement Supreme Court verdict in the TAIT-2022: Congress leader writes to CM
content:
A Congress leader has written to the Chief Minister.
*   The letter demands the implementation of a Supreme Court verdict.
*   The verdict specifically pertains to the TAIT-2022.
